about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: Actually, Paula Robison, who’s a world- renowned flutist now. She was in that same competition I was in... Anyway, she was there at Juilliard.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
